title: Claim
description: A structured assertion derived from evidence, linked to sources.

statement.description: The claim itself, stated clearly and precisely.

confidence.description: How confident the author is in this claim.

sourceIds.description: At least one source must back the claim.

questionId.description: The research question this claim helps answer.

origin.description: How this claim was created — manually by a human, extracted by AI, or AI-assisted.

reviewStatus.description: Whether a human has reviewed this claim (independent of publication status).

extractionMeta.description: Provenance metadata for AI-extracted claims. Null/absent for human-authored claims.

model.description: The LLM model used for extraction (e.g. 'gpt-4o', 'claude-3.5-sonnet').

sourcePassage.description: The exact passage from the source document that this claim was extracted from.

extractionConfidence.description: Model's confidence in the extraction accuracy (0-1). Separate from epistemological 'confidence'.

pipelineVersion.description: Version of the ingestion pipeline that produced this extraction.
